# Database Schema

This is the database schema implementation for the spec detailed in .agent-os/specs/2026-05-04-phase-2-intelligence-layer/spec.md

## Azure Table Storage Schema Changes

### Table: `Thoughts` — Additional Properties

New properties added to existing `Thoughts` table entities. Existing entities without these properties are treated as having default values at read time.

| Property | Type | Storage Format | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| `Tags` | `string` | Pipe-delimited: `"Stress\|Trading"` | Empty string `""` when no tags match |
| `Sentiment` | `string` | String enum: `"Positive"`, `"Negative"`, `"Neutral"` | Default `"Neutral"` if property absent |
| `IntensityScore` | `double` | Native double | Default `0.0` if property absent |

### Backward Compatibility

Existing `ThoughtEntry` entities already in the table will not have `Tags`, `Sentiment`, or `IntensityScore` properties. The repository must handle `null` property values on read by applying defaults:

```csharp
// Generated by AI on 05/04/2026
Tags = entity.GetString("Tags") is { Length: > 0 } raw
    ? raw.Split('|').ToList().AsReadOnly()
    : new List<string>().AsReadOnly(),
Sentiment = entity.GetString("Sentiment") ?? "Neutral",
IntensityScore = entity.GetDouble("IntensityScore") ?? 0.0
```

### InMemory Store

No schema changes needed for `InMemoryThoughtRepository` — `ThoughtEntry` POCO properties are extended directly.
